title: Warehouse Associate
description:
To support the expansion of business operations, we are seeking a detailed-oriented and organized Warehouse Associate to support our operations. He will ensure inventory accuracy, timely stock movements, and maintain proper storage to support smooth business operations.

Job Responsibilities:
* Managing and maintaining warehouse, inventory and records
* Check to ensure correct goods are received from suppliers, vendors, and couriers
* Processing orders using our business central ERP system
* Able to handle daily picking list needed for delivery using business central system
* Handle deliveries, picking and putting away of items
* Ensuring safety and regulations compliance when doing any task
* Do stock take when necessary
* Able to assist driver with heavy load when required
* Daily housekeeping to ensure the warehouse is clean and tidy at all times
Job Requirements:
* High initiative and proactive in organizing and completing tasks
* Attention to Detail: For accurate inventory, data entry, and compliance. To report any discrepancies found during locating of missing items.
* Verbal and basic writing skills for coordinating with teams, drivers, and stakeholders.
* Ability to handle unexpected issues in shipments or inventory.
* Knowledge of belt cutting (good to have)
* Ability to work under pressure.
* Working experience in warehouse or logistics preferred.
* Possess Class 3 driving license preferred

postedCompany.description:
Lian Eng Group is a Singapore home-grown industrial solutions provider with over 68 years of brand heritage. Established in 1954, our late founder Mr Tan Cheng Piat started a modest retail shop along Victoria Street focusing on the sale of general hardware tools and equipment.


Lian Eng Group has strategically grown over the decades to carry a comprehensive suite of products and services to better serve clients’ business requirements. Lian Eng Group has attained its long-standing brand reputation in the industry and is also the major distributor of many international brands such as Gates, Bando, Forbo, Dormer, Triangle, Nitecore and TilePlans.


For three generations running with a relentless pursuit towards excellence and growth, initiatives are continuously taken to modernise and provide an additional edge of professional consultancy and technical expertise to its clients.

Growing from strength to strength, Lian Eng Group has built a dedicated and competent team, developed its business infrastructure complete with manufacturing workshop and warehouse facilities, to cater to clients’ business needs.


At Lian Eng Group, our people are the core and heart of our business. We continuously empower the team to maximise their potential and consistently achieve business excellence for our key clients.


We are looking out for like-minded individuals with a strong passion and drive towards excellence to join us in supporting clients through their present business challenges, and positively impacting the long-term well being of future generations.
postedCompany.name: LIAN ENG PTE. LTD.
